name: Dog Hair Don't Care Tee
headline: Because lint rollers are just decoration at this point.
blurb: A love letter to every dog parent who's accepted that shedding is now their personality trait.
story: We started Underdog Goods because dog lovers deserve merch that gets the joke. This design celebrates the beautiful chaos of living with a shedding best friend. If your wardrobe doubles as a fur collection, this tee is your people.
recraft_prompt: Retro flat vector illustration of a stylized dog shedding a cloud of fur around them, with playful typography reading 'DOG HAIR DON'T CARE' in bold block letters below. The dog should have a confident, unbothered expression. Warm, mid-century modern color palette. Bold outlines, solid fills, no gradients. Centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic.

social.tt_hook: if your lint roller has a lint roller... this tee is for you 🐕
social.pin_title: Dog Hair Don't Care Tee | Funny Dog Lover Apparel
social.pin_keywords: dog mom shirt, funny dog tee, dog lover gift, shedding dog, dog parent
